claimText: The FINI (Fostering Investible National Implementation) initiative is supported by the IDB and GCF to develop USD 1 trillion in adaptation investment pipelines by 2028.
evidenceExcerpt: FINI is supported by IDB and GCF to develop USD 1 trillion in adaptation investment pipelines by 2028.
examUse: Statement-based question on climate finance initiatives and their backers.
distractorHooks: Supported by World Bank or IMF instead of IDB and GCF
Focuses on mitigation instead of adaptation

claimText: The Open Coalition on Compliance Carbon Markets aims to harmonize carbon pricing and integrity standards across national borders.
evidenceExcerpt: Open Coalition on Compliance Carbon Markets aims to harmonize carbon pricing and integrity standards across national borders.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching climate initiatives to their primary objectives.
distractorHooks: Focuses on voluntary carbon markets instead of compliance markets
Aims to establish a single global carbon tax

claimText: The Belem Declaration for Green Industrialization focuses on accelerating the decarbonization of heavy emitting industries.
evidenceExcerpt: Belem Declaration for Green Industrialization focuses on decarbonizing heavy emitting industries and promoting green industrialization.
examUse: Statement-based question on international declarations and their specific environmental focus.
distractorHooks: Focuses primarily on Amazon forest conservation
Targets agricultural emissions instead of heavy industries
